# DALLáE 2023-12-26 00.18.11 - A mystical study room reminiscent of Middle Earth, filled with ancient scrolls, books, and manuscripts. The room is lit by the soft glow of candles an.png*Created: Tuesday, December 26, 2023 at 12:20:24?AM*<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Sacred #Lexicon: Verses of the Vital Essence,</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>In the hush of ancient tomes and flicker of candlelight,</div>
<div>A linguist scribes, his quill alight with insight's might.</div>
<div>Scripture flows, a sacred rite, from depths of night,</div>
<div>Words of worth, in transcending flight, take their height.</div>
<div>From the wellspring of the sacred, a mystery unveiled,</div>
<div>Life force in letters, in parchment tales regaled.</div>
<div>A flow state captured in symbols, so finely detailed,</div>
<div>Healing in script, where once only silence prevailed.</div>
<div>This belief, a thread spun from the almighty's loom,</div>
<div>Weaving spells of serenity in the study room's gloom.</div>
<div>Each word a potion, dispelling despair and doom,</div>
<div>In a dance of divinity, letting sacred sexuality bloom.</div>
<div>A revealing of worth, in language's vast sea,</div>
<div>Each sentence a vessel, setting the spirit free.</div>
<div>A peace-bound spell, in written decree,</div>
<div>In the act of transcribing, we find our key.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>---- @ArtLb23 </div>
